backend/main.mo: Motoko actor that exposes a secure HTTP proxy endpoint and a Google Custom Search integration, both using HTTPS-enforced outbound HTTP calls with a transform callback that strips custom headers and adds a Content-Security-Policy header.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping two features—fixing frontend proxy/search mutations with proper state handling, and wiring search result clicks to proxy navigation—to their relevant source files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON dictionary of short summaries for each frontend source file, describing the purpose and key implementation details of every component, hook, and config file in the project.
frontend/index.css: Defines Tailwind base layer CSS custom properties for light and dark themes using OKLCH color tokens, covering background, foreground, border, chart, and sidebar variables.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point titled 'Study Tools' with a neutral educational meta description and a noindex/nofollow robots tag to prevent search engine indexing.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that renders BrowserLayout alongside a dark-themed Sonner toaster with custom OKLCH-based styles.
frontend/src/components/AddressBar.tsx: Smart address bar component that syncs to the active tab's URL, detects search vs. URL input to show contextual icons, and submits navigation on Enter or arrow button click while resetting cleanly on blur.
frontend/src/components/BrowserLayout.ts: Main browser chrome component that wires together tabs, address bar, proxy/search mutations, and the content area, handling navigation, reload, home, and error states across tabs.
frontend/src/components/CloakButton.tsx: Falcon cloak button with a dropdown to select a cloaking mode (about:blank, https://error, or a number string); clicking the button invokes the useCloaking hook with the selected mode.
frontend/src/components/ProxyContent.tsx: Renders proxied web content inside an iframe, injecting a base tag for relative URL resolution and intercepting link clicks and form submissions to route navigation through the app.
frontend/src/components/SearchResults.ts: Displays a list of Google search results with title, snippet, and display URL, handling clicks to navigate to result URLs via the onNavigate callback.
frontend/src/components/TabBar.tsx: Renders a browser-style tab bar with active tab highlighting, loading indicators, close buttons, and a new-tab button.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, invalidating dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useCloaking.ts: Provides a cloak function that opens the current app in a new popup window disguised with a configurable fake URL (about:blank, https://error, or a numeric string).
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements an Internet Identity authentication context and provider, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status via a React context hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Exposes two React Query mutations—useProxyRequest for fetching proxied URLs and useSearchRequest for Google Custom Search—both delegating to the ICP backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useTabManager.ts: Manages multi-tab browser state (add, close, switch, update tabs) with each tab holding URL, content, search results, loading, and error fields.
frontend/src/index.css: Defines the global CSS for the Cheetah Browser app, including a dark OKLCH-based theme with custom brand colors (orange, yellow, dark surfaces), Tailwind base/components/utilities imports, and utility classes for glows, scrollbars, and focus states.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider (React Query) and InternetIdentityProvider wrapping the root App component.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with Inter/JetBrains Mono fonts, OKLCH-based semantic color tokens, cheetah brand colors, custom border radii, box shadows, and animations; includes typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks the Cheetah Browser project state (version 3), listing existing features around proxy/search mutations and pending action requests to fix Google Custom Search API integration and the proxy backend so real search results and website loading work correctly.
